# ReplyRight

> ReplyRight is an AI-powered SaaS platform that automatically responds to Google Business Profile reviews on behalf of small and medium-sized businesses. It connects directly to Google Business Profile via OAuth, detects new reviews in real time, and posts personalized, professional AI-generated responses — automatically, 24/7, with no human action required.

## What ReplyRight Does

- Automatically detects new Google reviews the moment they're posted
- Generates personalized, human-sounding responses using AI
- Posts responses directly to Google Business Profile without any manual action
- Adapts tone and language to match the specific business type (restaurant, salon, medical, retail, etc.)
- Handles 1-star and negative reviews with care — apologizing, taking ownership, and inviting resolution
- Provides a dashboard with analytics on review volume, response rate, and star rating trends

## Who It's For

ReplyRight is built for small business owners, multi-location businesses, and marketing agencies managing Google reviews at scale. It works for any business type with a Google Business Profile — restaurants, salons, dental offices, gyms, hotels, auto repair shops, retail stores, medical clinics, and more.

## Plans & Pricing

- **Starter** — $29/month (or $23/month billed annually). 1 business location, automated responses, email support.
- **Pro** — $59/month (or $47/month billed annually). Up to 3 business locations, approval mode, priority support, analytics dashboard.
- **Agency** — $149/month (or $119/month billed annually). Unlimited business locations, white-label reporting, dedicated support.

All plans include a 14-day free trial. No credit card required upfront. Cancel anytime.

## Key Differentiators

- Fully automated — no manual copying, pasting, or prompting required
- Responses are posted within minutes of a review being submitted
- AI is trained to avoid generic phrases; responses reference specific details from each review
- Direct Google Business Profile integration via official OAuth — no third-party workarounds
- Works 24/7, even while the business owner is sleeping

## Compared to Alternatives

- **vs. ChatGPT manually**: ReplyRight eliminates the copy-paste workflow entirely. ChatGPT requires the user to manually copy each review, write a prompt, and paste the response back — for every review, every time.
- **vs. hiring someone**: ReplyRight costs a fraction of the cost of a part-time employee and responds instantly, not days later.
- **vs. ignoring reviews**: Businesses that respond to reviews see higher Google rankings, more customer trust, and higher conversion rates.
